tools.name: get_shop_overview
tools.title: Get shop overview
tools.description: Get a quick overview of the signed-in shop: number of customers, products, and repairs pending vs in progress.

tools.name: list_repairs
tools.title: List repairs
tools.description: List repair tickets for the signed-in shop, optionally filtered by status. Returns ticket number, device, status, costs and customer.

limit.description: Max number of repairs to return (default 25).

tools.name: search_inventory
tools.title: Search inventory
tools.description: Search the shop's product inventory by name, SKU or barcode. Returns matching products with stock quantity and prices.

query.description: Text to match against product name or SKU. Omit to list recent products.

low_stock_only.description: When true, only return products at or below their minimum stock level.

limit.description: Max number of products to return (default 25).

tools.name: search_customers
tools.title: Search customers
tools.description: Find customers of the signed-in shop by name, phone or email. Returns contact details, balance and loyalty points.

query.description: Text to match against customer name, phone or email. Omit to list recent customers.

limit.description: Max number of customers to return (default 25).
